Job_Title: Head of Data Science and MIS
Full_Description:
JOB SUMMARY

Head of Data Science & MIS is responsible for defining and leading the enterprise-wide strategy for Data Science, Advanced Modelling, and Management Information Systems (MIS). The role drives the development of predictive and prescriptive analytics capabilities to support executive decision-making, enabling accurate, timely, and commercially impactful business decisions.

 

DUTIES AND RESPONSIBILITIES

Lead, manage, and develop the Data Science and MIS teams to deliver high-impact modelling, analytics, and decision support capabilities across the organization.

Provide strategic direction and oversight for the design, development, and validation of predictive and prescriptive models to support revenue growth and business optimization.

Oversee the end-to-end lifecycle of analytics projects, ensuring alignment with business priorities, timelines, and performance targets.

Mentor and strengthen team capabilities in advanced statistical modelling, machine learning, data engineering, and business intelligence.

Develop executive dashboards and decision intelligence tools that translate complex analytics into clear, actionable insights for senior leadership.

Integrate and analyze Big Data from omni-channel sources, including digital platforms, Super App, offline transactions, tenant data, and customer behavior touchpoints.

Guide the team in translating analytical findings into executive-ready insights and decision frameworks.

Foster cross-functional collaboration between Data, Commercial, Marketing, Operations, and IT teams to embed data-driven decision-making.

JOB SPECIFICATION

Education and Experience:

Bachelor’s or Master’s degree, Statistics, Computer Science, Engineering, Mathematics, Business Analytics, or a related quantitative field.

Minimum 10–15 years of progressive experience in Data Science, Advanced Analytics, Predictive Modelling, and MIS, with at least 5 years in a senior leadership role.

Proven experience leading and scaling Data Science and Business Intelligence teams at an enterprise level.

Strong track record in developing and deploying predictive and prescriptive models that drive measurable business outcomes.

Experience designing and governing enterprise MIS and executive decision support systems.

Demonstrated ability to translate complex analytical outputs into strategic business recommendations for senior executives.

Experience in retail, loyalty programs, omni-channel ecosystems, digital platforms, or large-scale consumer data environments is highly preferred.

 

Required Skills/Abilities: 

Strong expertise in data modelling and machine learning

Solid MIS and executive reporting knowledge

Ability to translate data into business decisions

Proven team leadership in Data Science / BI

Proficiency in analytics tools (Python, R, SQL, BI)

Strong commercial and stakeholder management skills

Job Descriptions

• Lead and oversee Security Operations Center (SOC) activities.
• Manage and coordinate incident response processes across the organization.
• Develop and maintain incident response playbooks and procedures.
• Perform threat intelligence analysis and monitor evolving cyber threat landscapes.
• Conduct security risk analysis and recommend mitigation strategies.
• Collaborate with IT, Risk, Compliance, and Business Units to enhance cybersecurity posture.
• Provide strategic cybersecurity guidance and recommendations to management.
• Mentor and coach SOC and Incident Response team members.
• Support internal and external security audits and compliance activities.




Qualifications

• Bachelor’s degree or higher in Cybersecurity, Information Technology, or related field.
• Minimum 7 years of experience in cybersecurity roles.
• Proven experience managing SOC or Incident Response teams.
• Strong knowledge of threat detection, incident handling, and digital forensics.
• Strong understanding of security frameworks and standards such as ISO 27001, NIST, and MITRE ATT&CK.
• Strong analytical, investigative, and problem-solving skills.
• Leadership and team management capabilities.

We are seeking a highly experienced IS Section Manager to lead a large-scale ERP migration project (D365) and drive IT system transformation within the organization. This role is critical for project success and long-term IT leadership succession.

Company: TISCO Financial Group Public Company Limited
Full_Description:
Job description 

TISCO Financial Group is seeking a Data Analytics Officer responsible for leading the data analytics function of an organization and driving the use of data analytics to support business goals. This role involves analyzing large datasets to uncover insights into customer behavior and market trends, collaborating with cross-functional teams, communicating insights and recommendations to stakeholders, and developing and implementing data analytics solutions. The ideal candidate for this role will have a strong background in data analytics, excellent analytical and problem-solving skills, and the ability to communicate with both technical and non-technical stakeholders effectively. 




Responsibilities for a Data Analytics Officer: 

Develop and implement data analytics strategies and solutions to support the business goals of TISCO Financial Group. 

Collect, process, and analyze large datasets using statistical methods and data visualization tools. 

Identify trends, patterns, and insights in data and translate them into actionable recommendations for business improvement. 

Collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure data analytics solutions align with business needs. 

Communicate data insights and recommendations to stakeholders at all levels, including senior management. 

Stay up-to-date with the latest data analytics techniques and technologies to improve data analysis capabilities. 

Continuously evaluate and improve existing models to ensure their effectiveness and relevance in the ever-changing market environment 




Qualifications for a Data Analytics Officer: 

A bachelor's or master's degree in a related field such as mathematics, statistics, computer science, or engineering. 

Proven experience in data analytics, including experience with programming languages such as Python or R, and data analysis tools such as Excel, Tableau, or PowerBI. 

Strong problem-solving and analytical skills, with the ability to work with large amounts of data and extract meaningful insights. 

Excellent verbal and written communication skills, with the ability to explain complex data analysis to non-technical stakeholders. 

Ability to work well with cross-functional teams and comfortable collaborating with others to find solutions to complex problems. 

Adaptability and ability to learn new tools and technologies quickly. 

Strong attention to detail, with a focus on accuracy and completeness in data analysis. 

Creativity and the ability to think outside the box to generate new ideas to solve complex problems.

Job Title: Tester Engineer

Company: Sony Device Technology (Thailand) Co., Ltd. (SDT)

Location: Bang Kadi Industrial Park, Pathum Thani

Employment Type: Full-time




About Sony Device Technology (Thailand)

Sony Device Technology (Thailand) Co., Ltd. (SDT) serves as a core production and testing facility for Sony’s semiconductor business. Our facility in Bang Kadi Industrial Park specializes in the assembly and testing of Image Sensors and microscale semiconductor devices integrated into automotive safety and imaging systems.




Job Summary

As a Tester Engineer, you are responsible for maintaining and optimizing the high-precision semiconductor testing environment. Your role involves managing the technical lifecycle of test hardware, performing deep-dive circuit analysis to resolve failures, and utilizing data automation to drive yield improvements. You will ensure all testing processes comply with automotive-grade quality standards and support seamless product transitions from NPI to mass production.




Key Responsibilities

Manage the end-to-end technical setup, calibration, and hands-on maintenance of Automatic Test Equipment (ATE), including load boards, probers, and specialized fixtures. Perform advanced circuit analysis at the component level to diagnose complex hardware failures and electrical signal integrity issues. Utilize multimeters, oscilloscopes, and logic analyzers to execute hardware repairs and ensure 100% equipment readiness for New Product Introduction (NPI) and sustained mass production.

Analyze large-scale production datasets to identify yield detractors, cycle time bottlenecks, and manufacturing inefficiencies. Develop and implement Excel Macros (VBA) and custom automation scripts to streamline data processing, validate test result integrity, and automate technical reporting. Lead Root Cause Analysis (RCA) investigations into non-conforming (NG) defects using 8D or Why-Why methodologies to deploy permanent technical solutions and improve overall test stability.

Standardize technical documentation, including Operating Procedures (SOPs) and IC qualification protocols, ensuring strict adherence to automotive quality standards (IATF 16949). Partner with Design, Production, and Quality teams to evaluate "Design for Testability" (DFT) based on circuit performance data. Manage test correlation activities across multiple equipment platforms to ensure consistent accuracy and reliability across all production lots.




Qualifications & Competencies

Minimum Qualifications:

Bachelor’s Degree in Electronics Engineering, Electrical Engineering, or a related technical discipline.

0 – 3 years of experience in test engineering, equipment maintenance, or electronics manufacturing.

Demonstrated ability in circuit analysis and hardware diagnostics; skilled in using Multimeters, Oscilloscopes, and Logic Analyzers for troubleshooting.

High proficiency in Microsoft Excel, including the ability to develop and debug Macros and VBA scripts for data automation and analysis.

Strong logical and systematic problem-solving skills with experience in technical root cause analysis.




Preferred Qualifications:

Direct experience in semiconductor testing or electronics manufacturing.

Proficiency with statistical analysis software (e.g., JMP, Minitab) or data visualization tools.

Knowledge of automotive quality management systems (IATF 16949) and ESD control protocols in a production environment.

Relevant internship or senior project experience related to IC testing or automated systems.




Language & Professional Skills:

Ability to read and write technical documentation and reports in English. TOEIC 600+ is preferred.

Ability to communicate technical findings clearly to cross-functional teams in a fast-paced environment.

Strong attention to technical detail and disciplined adherence to safety and quality protocols.




Working Conditions

Ability to work in a Cleanroom environment, necessitating the use of a full cleanroom suit.

Ability to support on-call duties as required by the production schedule to ensure minimal downtime.


What we offer

5-Day Work Week: Monday – Friday

Provident Fund

Language Allowance: Monthly incentives for both TOEIC & JLPT with no expiry date throughout your career

Overtime Pay: Every extra hour is paid

Fuel allowance for private vehicles or Company shuttle bus/van service plus an additional travel allowance

Continuous Learning: Access to mandatory and elective training courses.

Accident Insurance

Incident and Service Reliability Manager

(Thailand Nationality Only)

Location: Sathorn Bangkok

Role Purpose:

As Major Incident & Service Reliability Manager, you are the central point of leadership during critical incidents and a key driver of service performance and availability IT’s international perimeter.

You will:

Lead major incidents end‑to‑end, from impact assessment to resolution and communication.

Coordinate cross‑functional technical teams, ensuring efficient investigations and sustainable fixes.

Drive continuous improvement, strengthening processes, monitoring, and overall service reliability.

Act as a clear, trusted communicator, providing timely, structured updates to management and international business stakeholders.

Main Responsibilities:

1. Incident Management

Lead and coordinate the response to major incidents across all supported entities.

Clarify business impact and criticality with all relevant parties (business, IT, vendors).

Define and organize workstreams to structure the incident resolution (roles, tasks, timelines).

Ensure complete and accurate incident records (incident details, impact, timeline, actions).

Produce and coordinate Root Cause Analysis (RCA) and follow‑up actions with relevant teams.

Clarify ticket ownership when responsibilities are unclear between teams.

Summarize key facts in the Incident Report (IR) and pre‑fill required fields.

Measure and monitor ticket quality and timeliness.

Take ownership of communication during major incidents, providing concise, regular, and transparent updates to all stakeholders (management, banks, internal IT teams).

Work closely with the Control and Monitoring Center (24/7) to continuously improve incident response and communication.

Define, maintain, and publish KPIs on incident response, resolution times, and reporting quality.

Report on major incident management in monthly reports and quality committees with the banks.

2. Problem Management

Ensure that, for every major incident, corresponding problems are raised to address root causes.

Follow up on problems with the relevant teams until permanent fixes are implemented.

Track and report to management on problem creation, status, and resolution.

Promote a “no recurrence” mindset, focusing on structural improvements rather than workarounds.

3. Monitoring & Observability Management

Ensure that all critical services (infrastructure and applications) are properly monitored.

In collaboration with business and technical teams, design and improve alerts (e.g. Zabbix, Splunk) to:

Detect incidents early.

Provide meaningful information (business impact, procedures, escalation).

Maintain and improve monitoring processes and procedures, ensuring alignment with best practices.

Act as a key stakeholder in shaping the overall observability strategy (metrics, logs, alerts, dashboards).

4. Governance, Controls & Reporting

Answer to controls and audits related to CMC activities (internal, external, regulatory).

Produce clear, data‑driven reports on incident and problem management for:

Internal IT management

SA and international banks

Contribute to quality committees, service reviews, and continuous improvement workshops.

5. Business Continuity & DR (Disaster Recovery)

Contribute to the planning, organization, coordination, and reporting of DR test activities.

Provide feedback from incidents and problems to improve DR scenarios, plans, and procedures.

Education

Minimum Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science/Engineering or equivalent experience.

Language skills

English Full Professional Proficiency (be able to work with international Banks).

Qualification :-

Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering or related fields

Enjoy working in a team environment

Responsible, fast learner and able to meet a deadline

Good in problem analyze and trouble shooting

At least 1 year of experience in Software Development

Required Skills :-

Basic programming logic and skills

Good Knowledge of programming design and concepts such as OOP and UML

Interest and willing to learn new technologies and frameworks to develop enterprise applications

Intermediate skill and knowledge in Java

Experience in one of the following technologies: Golang is a plus

Benefits :-

Competitive Salary

Provident funds

Health insurance

Annual health checkup

Activities: Annual trip, New year party, etc.

Job_Title: Physical Security & ICT Design Engineer (Data Center)
Full_Description:
Role Description:

We are seeking an experienced Physical Security & ICT Design Engineer to join our mission-critical Data Center design team. The ideal candidate will lead end-to-end design and coordination of ICT infrastructure and physical security systems for greenfield and brownfield Data Center projects. This includes structured cabling, telecom/network infrastructure, MMR/CR/MDA design, hyperscale compliance, system integration, and commissioning. The role requires strong knowledge of industry standards (TIA-942, ISO/IEC 11801, ISO/IEC 22237, ISO/IEC 27001, SBD) and collaboration with internal teams, clients, architects, MEP consultants, carriers, and vendors.

Key Responsibilities

ICT System Design & Development

Lead full lifecycle ICT design for Data Centers, covering structured cabling (copper/fiber), MMR/Carrier Rooms, Meet-me Rooms, MDAs, tenant rooms/racks, OOB/OA/Enterprise networks, fiber backbone (ISP/OSP), containment systems (tray/ladder/racks), conduits, and Wi-Fi/IoT planning.

Produce ICT high-level and detailed designs: SLDs, schematics, risers, rack elevations, cable schedules, BoM/BoQ, technical specs, and tender documents.

Design end-to-end telecom infrastructure including fiber entry pathways, redundant routing, and cross-connect architectures.

Ensure compliance with TIA-942, ISO/IEC 11801, ISO/IEC 22237, Uptime Tier Guidelines, and hyperscaler design guides (AWS, Meta, Google, Microsoft).

Physical Security System Design

Lead design of Access Control, Intrusion Detection, CCTV/Video Surveillance, PIDS, mantraps/secure portals, and control room/GSOC layouts.

Select compliant hardware: cameras, VMS, NDAA-compliant devices, biometric/OSDP card readers, NVRs/servers/storage, turnstiles, electric locks, and egress devices.

Conduct security risk assessments, CPTED reviews, and Security by Design evaluations.

Ensure alignment with local codes, DC operator standards, and international security guidelines.

Project Management & Coordination

Coordinate with architects, MEP, hyperscale/tenant teams, carriers/ISPs, ICT/security vendors, GCs, and subcontractors.

Review shop drawings, material submissions, RFIs, and provide technical guidance throughout the lifecycle.

Track schedules, manage deliverables, and prepare reports, presentations, and client-facing documentation.

Commissioning & Testing

Develop commissioning plans and test scripts for structured cabling, fiber/copper testing (Tier 1/Tier 2), security FAT/SAT, and integrated security systems.

Lead/support commissioning: validate installations, conduct inspections, prepare punch lists, acceptance tests, coordinate with carriers/integrators, and complete test reports, as-builts, and handover packages.

Documentation & Compliance

Produce technical designs, method statements, risk assessments, commissioning reports, as-builts, and O&M manuals.

Ensure compliance with local regulations, international ICT/security standards, and client/corporate quality requirements.

Qualifications & Technical Requirements

Degree in Engineering, ICT, Security, Telecommunications, or related field (preferred).

Minimum 3 years’ experience in ICT and security system design/engineering/commissioning for critical infrastructure (Data Centers preferred).

Proven experience designing/integrating:

Access Control Systems

Intrusion Detection Systems

CCTV/Video Surveillance

Perimeter Detection & Monitoring

Control Room Operations

Structured Cabling (Cat6A, OS2, MPO/MTP)

Cross-connect/patching architectures

Redundant fiber routing, cable management, containment

Carrier/ISP fiber delivery methods

Network room environmental requirements (power/cooling/space)

Proficiency with design tools (AutoCAD, Revit/BIM, Visio), Bluebeam, MS Project.

Preferred certifications: RCDD (BICSI) or equivalent, PSP/CPP, Security by Design credentials, CDCP/CDCS/DCDC.

Strong understanding of local security codes, building regulations, ISO 27001, TIA-942, and low-voltage/structured cabling fundamentals.

Knowledge of network basics (Layer 1/2, VLANs, OOB networks) is advantageous.

Experience collaborating with architects, MEP consultants, telecom/ICT teams.

Strong English communication skills and project management proficiency (MS Project, Trello, etc.).

Preferences

Ability to work independently, prioritize tasks, and manage multiple projects.

Excellent attention to detail, problem-solving skills, and stakeholder management.

Strong analytical and proactive approach.

Reliable, professional, and able to maintain confidentiality.

Team player with leadership capabilities.

Able to thrive under tight deadlines in fast-paced environments.

Willing to travel for site visits and inspections.

Previous Data Center ICT/security design and commissioning experience.

Experience with international DC standards (TIA-942, ISO/IEC 27001, Uptime Tier Guidelines).

Full_Description:
The RCC Transformation role supports and drives the development of strong operational foundations within the Retail Credit & Collection (RCC) function. This role is intended for early-career professionals with initial hands-on work experience who are eager to deepen their understanding of business processes and develop strong problem-solving and improvement skills. The role focuses on analyzing existing processes, identifying improvement opportunities, and contributing to the design and implementation of practical solutions. While close guidance is provided, the role is expected to demonstrate independent thinking, structured execution, and the ability to quickly apply prior work experience to new and complex operational challenges.

Role and Responsibilities / หน้าที่ความรับผิดชอบ: 

Process Analysis & Improvement

Analyze end-to-end processes across Retail Credit & Collection operations to identify inefficiencies, bottlenecks, rework, and improvement opportunities with direct operational impact.

Apply structured problem-solving and prior work experience to assess issues, frame clear problem statements, and propose practical, data-informed improvement ideas.

Work closely with business users and stakeholders to understand operational pain points and decision drivers across different functions.

Support the design of improved processes, including process flows, SOPs, and work instructions, contributing to the foundation of scalable and sustainable operations.

Project & Implementation Support

Contribute actively to cross-functional improvement initiatives and projects, gaining exposure to stakeholders from Operations, Risk, IT, and related teams.

Take ownership of assigned tasks or workstreams within improvement projects, with accountability for quality, timelines, and outcomes.

Support solution implementation and change activities, including communication, training preparation, and rollout coordination, ensuring ideas are translated into real operational change.

Monitor implementation progress, identify risks or dependencies, and proactively raise issues to support effective decision-making.

Performance Monitoring & Continuous Improvement

Support the tracking and analysis of key process performance metrics (e.g. turnaround time, productivity, error rate) to assess improvement effectiveness.

Participate in post-implementation reviews to evaluate results, capture learnings, and identify further enhancement opportunities.

Contribute insights and ideas to the team’s continuous improvement roadmap, helping prioritize initiatives with the highest business impact.

Documentation & Governance

Prepare and maintain clear and structured documentation such as process maps, SOPs, business requirements, and project materials to support transparency and knowledge sharing.

Ensure process changes are aligned with internal policies, control standards, and governance requirements in a regulated banking environment.

Support management reporting, reviews, or audit-related activities by organizing documentation and evidence as required.

Qualifications / คุณสมบัติ:  

Bachelor’s degree or higher in Industrial Engineering, Business Administration, Economics, Statistics, Information Technology, or related fields.

At least 1–3 years of working experience in operations, process improvement, consulting, analytics, project-based roles, or related fields.

Strong analytical thinking, ability to structure problems, and willingness to learn complex business processes.

Preferred

Experience in banking, financial services, or large-scale operations environments.

Exposure to process improvement, operational projects, or cross-functional initiatives.

Specific knowledge and skill / ความรู้เฉพาะตำแหน่ง: 

Process analysis, process mapping, and operational improvement concepts.

Basic data analysis skills or strong willingness to learn data-driven problem solving.

Ability to document processes and summarize findings in a clear and structured manner.

Good communication skills and openness to feedback and learning.

Job_Title: Data Center Technician, Data Center Operations
Full_Description:
Minimum qualifications:

Experience with assembly of mechanical or electrical systems, or performing component-level repairs and troubleshooting on technical equipment.
Experience with diagnosing and troubleshooting operating systems, computer hardware and server hardware.

Experience with networking protocols.

Ability to lift/move 50lb (23kg) of equipment and ability to exert yourself physically over extended periods of time, including frequent bending, kneeling, climbing, pushing/pulling and lifting.

Ability to work non-standard hours, including working weekends, night shifts, holidays and on shift-based schedules as required.
Preferred qualifications:

Bachelor's degree or equivalent practical experience.
4 years of experience in maintenance and monitoring of server systems.
Experience with performing component-level repairs and troubleshooting on IT equipment or in a related role (e.g., Systems Administration, Network Deployment Engineer, Help Desk Technician, etc).
Experience working within a data center or network operation center environment.
Experience with Linux operating systems.
Experience in project management and leadership, and collaborating and partnering with teams.
About the job
Google isn't just a software company. The Hardware Operations team is responsible for monitoring the physical infrastructure behind Google's powerful search technology. As an Operations Technician, you'll install, configure, test, troubleshoot and maintain hardware (like servers and its components) and server software (like Google's Linux cluster). You'll also take on the configuration of more complex components such as networks, routers, hubs, bridges, switches and networking protocols. You'll participate in or lead small project teams on larger installations and develop project contingency plans. A typical day involves manual movement and installation of racks, and while it can sometimes be physically demanding, you are excited to work with infrastructure that is at the cutting-edge of computer technology.

The AI and Infrastructure team is redefining what’s possible. We empower Google customers with breakthrough capabilities and insights by delivering AI and Infrastructure at unparalleled scale, efficiency, reliability and velocity. Our customers include Googlers, Google Cloud customers, and billions of Google users worldwide.

We're the driving team behind Google's groundbreaking innovations, empowering the development of our cutting-edge AI models, delivering unparalleled computing power to global services, and providing the essential platforms that enable developers to build the future. From software to hardware our teams are shaping the future of world-leading hyperscale computing, with key teams working on the development of our TPUs, Vertex AI for Google Cloud, Google Global Networking, Data Center operations, systems research, and much more.

Responsibilities

การทำงานภายในทีม จะใช้รูปแบบ Scrum Process โดยทีมจะทำงานร่วมกันอย่างใกล้ชิดกับ Product Owner และ Development team

ความสำเร็จของลูกค้า คือความสำเร็จของเรา

งานของเราช่วยสร้างความเชื่อมั่นในด้านคุณภาพให้กับงานของลูกค้า ด้วยการตรวจสอบที่ครบถ้วน อีกทั้งช่วยลดภาระการทำงานในแต่ละวันได้จริง

พนักงานซื่อสัตย์ จริงใจต่อตัวเองและผู้อื่น เพื่อสร้างบรรยากาศของการทำงานร่วมกัน ช่วยเหลือซึ่งกันและกัน

พนักงานทุกคนเรียนรู้ และพัฒนาการทำงานให้ได้ประสิทธิภาพมากขึ้น เพื่อทำให้สามารถพัฒนางานที่มีคุณภาพ เพื่อส่งมอบให้กับลูกค้า

ดูแล และให้คำปรึกษากับ QA ในทีม

สามารถสื่อสาร และแบ่งงานกับสมาชิกในทีม

จัดทำรายงาน ความคืบหน้าของโปรเจค

สามารถเดินทางเพื่อไป On-site ลูกค้าได้

Qualifications:

เข้าใจหน้าที่ ความรับผิดชอบของ QA ใน Software Development Life Cycle เช่น Scrum

Continuous Learning: Stay updated with emerging BI technologies and data analytics best practices to continuously improve the quality and efficiency of analytics deliverables.

Education & Experience

Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, Statistics, Business Administration, or a related field.

0–2 years of experience in data analysis, business intelligence, or a related field. Fresh graduates with strong academic projects or internship experience are encouraged to apply.

Technical Skills

Proficiency in SQL and experience working with relational databases (e.g., Google Big Query, MySQL, SQL Server, or personal database such as Excel, MS Access).

Hands-on experience or academic knowledge of reporting tools such as Power BI, Tableau, Looker or Excel Pivot Table for data visualization and dashboard creation.

Detail-oriented with a focus on quality.

Strong communication skills and a good command of English.

Company Description

H LAB is a young, energetic, and tech-savvy company focused on designing and developing efficient healthcare systems for public and private settings. Our team's expertise in healthcare systems engineering dates back to our roots at the Center for Health Systems Analytics, Chulalongkorn University. We tackle projects ranging from isolated units in hospitals to interconnected healthcare nodes and offer consulting services as well as systems innovation developments.




Role Responsibilities:

Project Management:

Define project scope and objectives.

Ensure all deliverables are completed within the agreed scope.

Manage changes to the project scope as necessary.

Ensure alignment of project deliverables with business objectives.

Develop and manage project plans, timelines, and budgets.

Identify, assess, and mitigate project risks.

Proactively address issues and implement solutions to keep projects on track.

Monitor and report on risk status throughout the project lifecycle.

Ensure project deliverables meet scope, quality, and performance expectations.

Utilize project management methodologies and tools effectively.

Planning & Scheduling:

Develop detailed project schedules, breaking down tasks and establishing clear milestones.

Monitor project progress and make adjustments as needed.

Communicate project timelines effectively to all stakeholders.

Utilize project management tools to track progress and performance.

Managing Project Contracts:

Oversee contract negotiations and compliance.

Ensure all contractual obligations are met by both the company and the client.

Handle any contract-related disputes or issues.

Maintain thorough documentation of contract changes and updates.

Team Management

Oversee both outsourced and in-house development teams.

Ensure clear communication and collaboration between team members.

Monitor progress and provide guidance to ensure project goals are met.

Foster a positive and productive team environment.

Allocate and manage resources effectively.

Identify and address any resource constraints or issues.

Optimize team performance through appropriate training and development.

Track resource utilization and ensure optimal use of team members.

Managing Budgets:

Develop and manage project budgets.

Ensure cost-effective utilization of resources.

Monitor expenses and ensure they align with the project budget.

Ensuring Quality Assurance:

Implement quality assurance processes to ensure deliverables meet required standards.

Conduct regular quality checks and reviews.

Address quality issues promptly and effectively.

Change Management:

Develop and implement a comprehensive change management plan to ensure smooth user adoption of the new HIS.

Facilitate training sessions and workshops for hospital staff on the new system.

Address user concerns and provide ongoing support throughout the transition.

Managing Customer Relationships:

Serve as the primary point of contact for clients.

Build and maintain strong relationships with hospital stakeholders, including IT teams, administrators, and clinicians.

Understand hospital needs and translate them into project requirements.

Manage customer expectations throughout the project lifecycle.

Facilitate regular meetings and communications with stakeholders.

Address customer feedback and concerns promptly and effectively.

Managing Stakeholder Communication:

Maintain transparent communication with all stakeholders.

Provide regular project updates and reports.

Ensure stakeholder expectations are managed and met.

Key Responsibilities

2. Engineering Leadership & Solution Delivery 70% 

Enterprise-Scale Delivery: Oversee the full lifecycle of AI products from proof-of-concept (PoC) to production. Ensure solutions meet rigorous IT standards for scalability, reliability, and security. 

MLOps & Financial Stewardship (FinOps): Implement CI/CD pipelines for model retraining and deployment.  

Architectural Review: Review and approve technical designs, ensuring the seamless integration of AI agents with legacy systems, Vector Databases, and Enterprise Data Warehouses. 

Technical Mentorship: Act as the " Technical Mentor" for internal squads. Guide business teams through the use case development and prototyping phase, helping them convert raw ideas into deployable. 

3. AI Governance 10% 

AI Guardrails & Compliance: Collaborate with Legal, Risk, and Data Privacy officers to enforce an AI Governance Framework. Ensure strict adherence to PDPA/GDPR, data residency requirements, and IP protection standards. 

 

Qualifications & Skills

3-5 years of technical experience in AI/ML Engineering experience. 

Proven track record of developing, testing and deploying Generative AI / LLM solutions. 

Solid understanding of MLOps , CI/CD for ML, and Data pipelines. 

Experience in Cloud AI and Infrastructure management. 

Experience in API integration with Generative AI, prompt engineering, RAP Pipeline design and fine-tuning basic. 

Strong Communication Proficiency in English and Thai. 

Self-Directed Learning Velocity  

Intellectual Curiosity & Experimentation Mindset  

Resilience to Technical Obsolescence

Imagine leading a multicultural cross-functional team of data engineers and collaborate closely with product managers, architects, and global stakeholders. You will play a pivotal role in building and scaling high-quality, cloud-native data products on our global cloud-based data platform, driving data-driven business transformation across Pandora – the world’s largest jewellery brand. 




Your mission is to ensure excellence in engineering practices, delivery of reliable and scalable data solutions, and nurturing of a high-performing, innovative team. This is a leadership role with a strong technical foundation. 




We love that you will… 

Lead, mentor, and develop a team of skilled data engineers working on the Azure PaaS stack. 

Foster a collaborative, inclusive, and high-performance culture within the team. 

Support career growth through coaching, performance reviews, and development plans. 

Collaborate with architects, product managers, and other stakeholders to design and deliver scalable data solutions and analytics products. 

Ensure timely delivery of data products aligned with business goals and technical standards. 

Drive best practices in data engineering, including CI/CD, testing, data modelling, and engineering quality. 

Drive the modernization journey from IaaS to Azure PaaS using technologies like ADF, Data Lake, Synapse, Databricks, and Analysis Services. 

Contribute to architectural decisions and long-term platform evolution, supporting use cases across analytics, AI, and reporting. 

Promote innovation by exploring new tools, frameworks, and practices to improve data product development. 

Balance technical debt and feature development, ensuring scalability and maintainability. 




We love that you are… 

Bachelor’s or master’s degree in computer science, Data Engineering, or a related field. 

7+ years of experience in data engineering roles with increasing responsibility. 

3+ years in a technical leadership or engineering management role. 

Deep expertise in Azure Data Services (Databricks, Data Factory, Data Lake, Synapse). 

Strong understanding of data architecture, data modelling, and warehousing concepts. 

Experience within SQL, PySpark, and Python  

Hands-on experience with CI/CD and DevOps,  

Familiarity with containerization and streaming technologies is a bonus. 

Strong understanding of modern data governance, quality, and observability practices. 

Excellent stakeholder communication and relationship management skills. 

Comfortable working in a virtual, multicultural, and agile environment. 




Welcome to our Crafting & Supply 

The magic happens at our crafting facilities, where we combine centuries-old crafting traditions and high-quality materials with modern production techniques. You will be warmly greeted with over 13,000 craftspeople who are excellent at crafting and supplying the world’s largest jewellery brand with our craftsmanship. You will be part of a team of D&A Management people and report to VP, Data & Analytics. 




Join a team that is as diverse and inclusive as our jewellery. We believe and value creative thinking and ensure that there’s equitable opportunities for all. 

Foster your growth and craft opportunities through our learning and development programmes. 

At Pandora, no effort or contribution goes unnoticed. We offer a wide range of opportunities and benefits to ensure that our employees feel valued, supported, and cared for. 

Transportation services are also available to drop you at the closet BTS station and other community areas.  




About Pandora Crafting & Supply  

Pandora started crafting its jewellery in Thailand in 1989, where our founders fell in love with the delicate craftsmanship of the Thai people. To date, there are two crafting facilities in Thailand, Bangkok, and Lamphun, and we employ more than 13,000 skilled craftspeople. By the end of 2024, there are 113 million pieces sold globally, all of which were hand-finished here in Thailand by our skilled craftspeople using high-quality raw materials and sustainable methods.   




About Pandora Group  

Pandora is the world’s largest jewellery brand. Designed in Denmark and crafted in Thailand, Pandora jewellery provides endless opportunities for personalisation, allowing people to express their passions and show who they are. The company’s products are made from high-quality materials and sold in more than 100 countries through 6,785 points of sale, including 2,788 concept stores. 

Pandora is committed to leadership in sustainability and is sourcing lab-grown stones and recycled silver and gold for all its jewellery. Headquartered in Copenhagen, Denmark, Pandora employs 37,000 people worldwide, is listed on the Nasdaq Copenhagen stock exchange, and generated sales of DKK 31.7 billion (EUR 4.25 billion) in 2024.

Wisesight is looking for Research Specialists to join our Social Media Data Analytics Team. Our mission is to explore the world of social media and develop a deep understanding of social media users.
